title: Community event: Introducing the new data infrastructure

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Mark your calendars and join us for another community event. This time we will be introducing you to our new underlying data architecture, serving the monday.com Work OS platform and product ecosystem.

With the new data architecture, you can expect:

  1. Lightning-fast performance, with boards and dashboards loading much, much faster.
  2. 10x capacity, adapting to the biggest, most complex work scenarios on the market.
  3. Robust developer capabilities, allowing you to build any app, solution, or software you need on top of the monday.com platform.
    And much, much more.

Please find the APAC event details here.
Learn more about mondayDB here and register for our event today!
